testcase.name: Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P0] public schedule page still loads after migrations applied
Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P0] public standings page still loads after migrations applied
Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P1] coach login page still loads after migrations applied
Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P1] admin login page still loads after migrations applied
Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P1] teams-related page loads without DB column error after migration 003
Story 1.1: Database Migrations — Application-Level Smoke Tests (ATDD) › [P2] application remains fully functional after migrations are applied twice (idempotency regression)
